query: so, yeah.. not sure how that got messed up.  I was specific in my directin and said I'm NOT that interested in session 1->2, but I WAS very interested in any pattern that did a search then lookup... now that I'm thinking about it really ANY direct lookup I can argue likely had some value to the agents that they would have otherwise either not had, or taken alot more tokens to find. I'd like you to consider 1. Should these bugs be handled together? Based on that response, create either 1 or 2 gh issues with the details provided.  Stop afterwards for the next step.  Be sure to be thorough in the data you place in these issues, other agents will likely fix them

entries.title: context_get fails at agent startup when querying entry IDs not yet stored in that session
context_get fails 13x due to integer serialization bug — use context_search as fallback
Long-wait parallel agent resumes with stale ADR context — tick-file agents must re-read architecture after 60+ min gaps
